text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our senior-year summer has come to an end—one
I spent running around with Matikanefukukitaru.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wow, we really gave 110 percent out there, huh,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
With my time at summer camp and the regional
races, I've had lots of opportunities to take in the
wonders of nature!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What I really want to say is, gods exist in all kinds
of different places.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hm, I don't know how best to put it, but gods
exist in every mountain, every ocean, and every
town...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
By connecting with them, I feel more and more
energized.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but that doesn't just apply to gods. I think it
helps me to connect with other people too.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
People exist in all corners of this world, most of
them strangers. By trusting in them and having
them do the same in return, we can all lift our
spirits together.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's what faith is all about—the power of
believing.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, that sounded pretty deep! I can't believe I
just said that!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I don't know if I'm making any sense, but never
mind that. Let's head back home! The Arima
Kinen is waiting for us!
